This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] valid: created normally
  assert_equals: document.baseURI expected "about:blank" but got "http://web-platform.test:8001/fake/base-from-outer-frame"
[FAIL] valid: created using another iframe's parseHTMLUnsafe from this frame
  assert_equals: document.baseURI expected "about:blank" but got "http://web-platform.test:8001/fake/base-from-iframe"
[FAIL] valid: created using another iframe's parseHTMLUnsafe from that frame
  assert_equals: document.baseURI expected "about:blank" but got "http://web-platform.test:8001/fake/base-from-iframe"
[FAIL] invalid XML: created normally
  assert_equals: document.baseURI expected "about:blank" but got "http://web-platform.test:8001/fake/base-from-outer-frame"
[FAIL] invalid XML: created using another iframe's parseHTMLUnsafe from this frame
  assert_equals: document.baseURI expected "about:blank" but got "http://web-platform.test:8001/fake/base-from-iframe"
[FAIL] invalid XML: created using another iframe's parseHTMLUnsafe from that frame
  assert_equals: document.baseURI expected "about:blank" but got "http://web-platform.test:8001/fake/base-from-iframe"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
